apply: Use the properties of hydrogen to identify it in different compounds.
Apply the knowledge of hydrogen chemistry to solve problems related to its preparation and uses.
analyze: Compare the properties of hydrogen with other elements in the periodic table.
Analyze the uses of hydrogen in different industries and its impact on the environment.
remember: Recall the properties, isotopes and compounds of hydrogen.
List the different methods of preparation of hydrogen.
Identify the physical and chemical properties of hydrogen.
understand: Explain the structure of hydrogen atom and molecule.
Describe the preparation of hydrogen through different methods.
Discuss the physical and chemical properties of hydrogen in detail.

ncert_objectives: To recall the properties, preparation, and uses of hydrogen.
To explain the structure and chemical properties of hydrogen.
To describe the different methods of preparation of hydrogen and its importance.
board_exam_objectives: To recall the preparation, properties, and uses of hydrogen.
To explain the physical and chemical properties of hydrogen and its importance.
To describe the different methods of preparation of hydrogen and its applications.
